steps.t: Make your way to Jiret-menêsh and speak with Bêtam the Couthful. He, or one of his kin will surely have details on where the hidden citadel may be.
Bêtam explained that he will provide you a map for the price of collecting a prized smith's hammer from the resting place of Kojomedên in the Quelling…
You claimed the hammer from the despoiled corpse of a once great dwarf artisan. Return Kojomedên's hammer to Bêtam the Couth at Jiret-menêsh. If he is…
